ID: US-OLV-028
Title: Show shared topbar
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-16
Milestone: Port Accounts UX and complete module hub shell

As a operator
I want consistent topbar navigation and sync status
So that I can orient myself and see save state

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Topbar shows the current workspace or account title.
- [ ] The hamburger toggles side navigation on narrow layouts.
- [ ] Sync indicator shows saving/error/synced states.
- [ ] Export is available from account detail context.

Notes: Topbar order and labels were repeatedly tuned to match source.
